description_long: This object visually resembles a topographic model of a mountainous landscape, with a flat base and a series of steep, jagged peaks rising along one edge. The surface is covered in a photorealistic texture that mimics satellite imagery, showing a patchwork of green, brown, and gray areas that suggest forests, urban zones, and open land. The tallest peaks are clustered together, forming a dramatic ridge, while the rest of the surface gently slopes downward. The edges of the model are irregular, following the contours of the terrain. There are no visible features that resemble a bird, such as wings, beak, or feathers. The object appears solid and is likely made from a rigid material, with a hard, matte finish.
description: A detailed, textured model of a mountainous landscape with steep peaks and a flat base, covered in satellite imagery. The surface features dramatic elevation changes and a patchwork of natural and urban textures.
description_view_0: The model is seen from a low angle, highlighting the steep rise of the mountains along the right edge and the flat expanse in the foreground.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the jagged, irregular edge of the mountains, with the flat terrain receding into the background.
description_view_2: A higher perspective reveals the full extent of the mountainous ridge and the detailed surface texture, with the tallest peaks on the left.
description_view_3: The model is viewed from above, showing the patchwork of textures and the dramatic elevation change along the top edge.
